item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 271800Z AUTO 32010KT 290V360 9999 -TSRA FEW027/// BKN052/// BKN070/// ///CB 25/20 Q1015 BECMG NSW NSC
